summary: Apple App Store Server Notifications v2 webhook handler testing complete. All 10 backend tests PASS. Frontend login/dashboard/settings flows verified working.

apple_webhook_empty_body.description: Returns 400 with 'Missing signedPayload' for empty JSON body {}

apple_webhook_missing_signedPayload.description: Returns 400 with 'Missing signedPayload' when signedPayload key absent

apple_webhook_malformed_jws.description: Returns 400 with 'Invalid signedPayload' for JWS without 3 parts

apple_webhook_invalid_base64_jws.description: Returns 400 with 'Invalid signedPayload' for JWS with invalid base64

apple_webhook_jws_without_x5c.description: Returns 400 with 'Invalid signedPayload' for JWS without x5c certificate chain

subscription_plans_endpoint.description: Returns plans array with premium, standard, base plans

subscription_status_endpoint.description: Returns valid subscription status for authenticated user

apple_receipt_validation_empty.description: Returns 400 with 'Missing transaction_id or product_id' for empty body

apple_receipt_validation_unknown_product.description: Returns 400 with 'Unknown product: ...' for invalid product IDs

dashboard_loads.description: Dashboard loads correctly with sidebar navigation and onboarding flow

settings_page_loads.description: Settings page loads with Profile, Push Notifications, and Subscription sections

gdpr_delete_account_option.description: GDPR Article 17 compliant delete account option found in settings

guards_past_due_status.description: Subscription guards correctly treat 'past_due' (Apple grace period) as active access

checkout_past_due_status.description: Subscription status endpoint correctly includes 'past_due' as active subscription

apple_to_plan_mapping.description: APPLE_TO_PLAN mapping covers all product IDs (premium, standard, base, new_adult, military, veteran, hospice, beneficiary variants)

critical_code_review_comments: Apple webhook correctly implements JWS verification with x5c certificate chain extraction
Webhook logs all notifications to apple_webhook_log collection for audit trail
APPLE_TO_PLAN mapping is now DRY - imported from apple_webhook.py in checkout.py
'past_due' status properly treated as active in both guards.py and checkout.py for Apple grace period
All notification handlers (SUBSCRIBED, DID_RENEW, EXPIRED, DID_FAIL_TO_RENEW, REFUND, REVOKE, DID_CHANGE_RENEWAL_STATUS) properly implemented
context_for_next_testing_agent: Apple webhook testing completed. All error handling paths verified. The webhook JWS verification requires real Apple-signed payloads which cannot be generated in test environment - only error paths were testable. Backend test file /app/backend/tests/test_apple_webhook.py covers all webhook error scenarios. Login flow uses fulltest@test.com / Password.123.
